markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review November performance and align on the tech partner content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/yzs9PgpiaKRyDHBALUwC-YaEHRmXVB7A?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Content Strategy:** The tech partner content strategy is approved. It will feature objective partner comparisons and new "implementation guides" to address the business impact of tech decisions.](https://fathom.video/share/yzs9PgpiaKRyDHBALUwC-YaEHRmXVB7A?tab=summary&timestamp=762.0)
  - [**LLM Optimization:** To capture LLM traffic, the strategy will prioritize comparison tables. This requires developing a custom module in Sanity, a task now feasible during Webstacks' holiday site redesign.](https://fathom.video/share/yzs9PgpiaKRyDHBALUwC-YaEHRmXVB7A?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)
  - [**Performance Dip:** November traffic dipped to September levels, likely due to holiday seasonality. LLM visibility is also down from its September peak, reinforcing the need for the new content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/yzs9PgpiaKRyDHBALUwC-YaEHRmXVB7A?tab=summary&timestamp=1267.0)
  - [**Strategic Shift:** Webstacks' holiday site redesign provides an opportunity to restructure the blog around a "hub and spoke" model, using evergreen pillar pages to improve recency and topical authority.](https://fathom.video/share/yzs9PgpiaKRyDHBALUwC-YaEHRmXVB7A?tab=summary&timestamp=1534.0)

## Topics

### November Performance Review

  - [**Traffic Dip:** November click traffic dipped to September levels.](https://fathom.video/share/yzs9PgpiaKRyDHBALUwC-YaEHRmXVB7A?tab=summary&timestamp=1267.0)
      - [**Cause:** Likely holiday seasonality and the lingering impact of Google's September algorithm update.](https://fathom.video/share/yzs9PgpiaKRyDHBALUwC-YaEHRmXVB7A?tab=summary&timestamp=1267.0)
      - [**Trend:** A positive traffic uptick in early November was cut short by Thanksgiving week.](https://fathom.video/share/yzs9PgpiaKRyDHBALUwC-YaEHRmXVB7A?tab=summary&timestamp=1341.0)
  - [**LLM Visibility:** Down from its September peak.](https://fathom.video/share/yzs9PgpiaKRyDHBALUwC-YaEHRmXVB7A?tab=summary&timestamp=1370.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This dip validates the new content strategy's focus on LLM-friendly formats like comparison tables.](https://fathom.video/share/yzs9PgpiaKRyDHBALUwC-YaEHRmXVB7A?tab=summary&timestamp=1370.0)
      - [**Positive Signal:** Recent Scrunch data shows Webstacks is being cited for both awareness and evaluation-stage prompts, indicating strong performance across the funnel.](https://fathom.video/share/yzs9PgpiaKRyDHBALUwC-YaEHRmXVB7A?tab=summary&timestamp=1771.0)

### New Content Strategy: Tech Partners

  - [**Goal:** Capture LLM traffic by creating objective, comparison-based content.](https://fathom.video/share/yzs9PgpiaKRyDHBALUwC-YaEHRmXVB7A?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)
  - [**Approval:** Webstacks approved direct comparisons between tech partners.](https://fathom.video/share/yzs9PgpiaKRyDHBALUwC-YaEHRmXVB7A?tab=summary&timestamp=479.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Aligns with Webstacks' platform-agnostic positioning.](https://fathom.video/share/yzs9PgpiaKRyDHBALUwC-YaEHRmXVB7A?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
      - [**Constraint:** Content must remain objective and never speak negatively about a tool.](https://fathom.video/share/yzs9PgpiaKRyDHBALUwC-YaEHRmXVB7A?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
  - [**New Content Type:** "Implementation Guides" will be added.](https://fathom.video/share/yzs9PgpiaKRyDHBALUwC-YaEHRmXVB7A?tab=summary&timestamp=762.0)
      - [**Rationale:** To address the business impact of tech decisions, which often lead to expensive migrations when teams lack the processes and skills to use a tool effectively.](https://fathom.video/share/yzs9PgpiaKRyDHBALUwC-YaEHRmXVB7A?tab=summary&timestamp=762.0)
  - [**LLM Optimization:** Comparison tables are a key format for LLM traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/yzs9PgpiaKRyDHBALUwC-YaEHRmXVB7A?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)
      - [**Action:** Webstacks will develop a custom comparison module in Sanity.](https://fathom.video/share/yzs9PgpiaKRyDHBALUwC-YaEHRmXVB7A?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)
      - [**Timing:** This is now feasible during the holiday site redesign.](https://fathom.video/share/yzs9PgpiaKRyDHBALUwC-YaEHRmXVB7A?tab=summary&timestamp=1534.0)

### Strategic Shift: Site Redesign & Content Structure

  - [**Webstacks Redesign:** A holiday site redesign is underway to elevate the brand to an "agency studio feel."](https://fathom.video/share/yzs9PgpiaKRyDHBALUwC-YaEHRmXVB7A?tab=summary&timestamp=1543.0)
  - [**Content Restructure:** The redesign provides an opportunity to reorganize the blog.](https://fathom.video/share/yzs9PgpiaKRyDHBALUwC-YaEHRmXVB7A?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
      - [**Proposed Model:** A "hub and spoke" structure built around evergreen pillar pages.](https://fathom.video/share/yzs9PgpiaKRyDHBALUwC-YaEHRmXVB7A?tab=summary&timestamp=1405.0)
      - [**Rationale:** To improve recency and topical authority for Google and LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/yzs9PgpiaKRyDHBALUwC-YaEHRmXVB7A?tab=summary&timestamp=1405.0)
      - [**Benefit:** Allows for content refreshes by adding new modules instead of writing full articles.](https://fathom.video/share/yzs9PgpiaKRyDHBALUwC-YaEHRmXVB7A?tab=summary&timestamp=1701.0)

### Logistics & Planning

  - [**Holiday Schedule:**](https://fathom.video/share/yzs9PgpiaKRyDHBALUwC-YaEHRmXVB7A?tab=summary&timestamp=1143.0)
      - [**GrowthX:** Out the week of Christmas; light Slack monitoring.](https://fathom.video/share/yzs9PgpiaKRyDHBALUwC-YaEHRmXVB7A?tab=summary&timestamp=1143.0)
      - [**Webstacks:** Quiet week of New Year's.](https://fathom.video/share/yzs9PgpiaKRyDHBALUwC-YaEHRmXVB7A?tab=summary&timestamp=1143.0)
      - [**Production:** No new content will be produced for the week of New Year's.](https://fathom.video/share/yzs9PgpiaKRyDHBALUwC-YaEHRmXVB7A?tab=summary&timestamp=1143.0)
  - [**Meeting Cadence:** Shifting to biweekly in January to focus on high-level strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/yzs9PgpiaKRyDHBALUwC-YaEHRmXVB7A?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jessalynn:**](https://fathom.video/share/yzs9PgpiaKRyDHBALUwC-YaEHRmXVB7A?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
      - [Finalize the tech partner content plan, incorporating "implementation guides" and deeper keyword research.](https://fathom.video/share/yzs9PgpiaKRyDHBALUwC-YaEHRmXVB7A?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
      - [Send the final plan to Webstacks by EOD Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/yzs9PgpiaKRyDHBALUwC-YaEHRmXVB7A?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
  - [**Jesse:**](https://fathom.video/share/yzs9PgpiaKRyDHBALUwC-YaEHRmXVB7A?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
      - [Provide real-world examples (e.g., Gong snippets) of Webstacks' platform-agnostic positioning.](https://fathom.video/share/yzs9PgpiaKRyDHBALUwC-YaEHRmXVB7A?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
      - [Deliver a fresh CMS export with content tags to enable cohort analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/yzs9PgpiaKRyDHBALUwC-YaEHRmXVB7A?tab=summary&timestamp=1898.0)
  - [**Katya:**](https://fathom.video/share/yzs9PgpiaKRyDHBALUwC-YaEHRmXVB7A?tab=summary&timestamp=1884.0)
      - [Refine the November performance report to include blog leads and cohort data.](https://fathom.video/share/yzs9PgpiaKRyDHBALUwC-YaEHRmXVB7A?tab=summary&timestamp=1874.0)
      - [Share the updated report by Tuesday for the strategic meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/yzs9PgpiaKRyDHBALUwC-YaEHRmXVB7A?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
      - [Research and present insights on the "hub and spoke" content model next week.](https://fathom.video/share/yzs9PgpiaKRyDHBALUwC-YaEHRmXVB7A?tab=summary&timestamp=1405.0)
